title: SiTime Q3 2024 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates - Zacks
text: SiTime (SITM) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates on November 6, 2024. The company reported 62% year-over-year revenue growth, significantly outperforming expectations. Quarterly earnings of $0.40 per share beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.26 per share. Net income was $9.6 million, representing 17% of revenue. The strong performance was driven by exceptional growth in the communications, enterprise, and data center segment, with triple-digit growth in CED, Greater China, and EMEA regions. This marked a significant inflection point in the company's growth trajectory as it successfully transitioned from inventory correction to strong organic growth.
